free_text: Investigation of excited states of 6Li nucleus in
3He(alpha, p+alpha)d reaction at alpha-particle energy
27.2 MeV
Russ. original of BAS,67,1747,2003
Solid TiT target thick (2.7 mg/cm2) saturated by
tritium in ratio 1:1
Proton and alpha detected in coincidence
Four telescopes (dE 120 um and E
1-1.5 mm) used simultaneosly, two (1.30 and 3.67 msr)
on the left side and two (1.44, 3.61 msr) on the
right side with respect to beam direction.
Corrected for background
Statistical error
Data were received from O.M.Povoroznyk
Entries were transformed to deutron energy
dependence by O.M.Povoroznyk using Q=-5.49 MeV and
energy step 0.2 MeV
UKRNDC
page numb. in ref. on BAS was corrected.
UKRNDC: was added #NSR
On. REFERENCE: Eng. and Rus. ref. swapped.
ANG1 is angle between incident beam and proton,
ANG2 is angle between incident beam and alpha-particle.
